title: Cool Mint
description: This pack takes the vanilla textures of the game and enhance it using my favorite colors, Minty green and Purple
body:
## My First Public Texture Pack Release!

This is my very first texture pack released to the public! It’s mainly designed for Cart PvP, but you can use it for anything you like.

A very simple texture pack with only a few textures.

The pack is built around my two favorite colors: minty green and purple. It enhances the default textures, giving them a fresh and improved look while keeping the original feel.

If you especially like these colors, you’re definitely going to love this texture pack.

Enjoy!
